description: Intent-only request: classify an open-ended refund review as an agent because the path depends on runtime findings.

text: Create a refund assistant that handles incoming customer refund requests. It should inspect the customer's order history, read prior support messages, compare the situation against our refund policy, ask follow-up questions when needed, approve straightforward refunds, and escalate suspicious or ambiguous cases to a human.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the refund assistant request as a full agent.
The agent explains that the next action depends on interpreting prior tool results and customer context.
The agent identifies nuanced judgment, unstructured data, and follow-up decisions as reasons for agent handling.
The agent does not reduce the request to a fixed deterministic workflow.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a full agent and explains that control flow must be discovered at runtime.
